user.title: Kirk Hill Wind Farm
user.description: Enter the API key from your Kirk Hill dashboard. It is used read-only.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Kirk Hill
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key was rejected. Enter a valid key to continue.

error.invalid_auth: The API key is not valid.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kirk Hill API. Check your connection and try again.
error.password_change_required: Your dashboard requires a password change before API keys work. Change it on the Kirk Hill dashboard, then retry.

data_description.scan_minutes: How often to poll the API (1–60 minutes).
data_description.range: Window used for the generation, turbine and wind-speed figures.
data_description.price_gbp_per_mwh: Your negotiated £/MWh price. Leave blank to disable the revenue sensors.
